# PINGEQUA RF Lab

> Open-source 2.4 GHz spectrum analyzer and NRF24 jammer for Flipper Zero. Designed exclusively for the PINGEQUA 2-in-1 RF Devboard. Plug-and-play across Momentum, Unleashed, RogueMaster, and Official Flipper firmware.

## What this project is

PINGEQUA RF Lab is a Flipper Application Package (FAP) that turns Flipper Zero plus the PINGEQUA 2-in-1 RF Devboard into a real-time 2.4 GHz spectrum scanner and NRF24 jammer. It supports max-hold spectrum capture, WiFi 1/6/11 + BLE 37/38/39 band markers, microsecond-resolution dwell tuning, and CW + Sweep jamming modes.

## Hardware

The application is designed for and only fully tested on the **PINGEQUA Flipper Zero NRF24+CC1101 2-in-1 RF Devboard**, available at https://www.pingequa.com/products/flipper-zero-nrf24-cc1101-2-in-1-rf-devboard

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): Project overview, installation, comparison table
- [Quickstart](docs/QUICKSTART.md): Five-minute setup
- [UI Guide](docs/UI_GUIDE.md): Detailed screen layout
- [Hardware](docs/HARDWARE.md): Pin mapping, firmware compatibility
- [Use Cases](docs/USE_CASES.md): Ten real-world scenarios
- [FAQ](docs/FAQ.md): Common questions
- [Troubleshooting](docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md): Error codes and recovery
- [Build](docs/BUILD.md): ufbt build instructions

## Firmware compatibility

- Momentum (mntm-dev) — primary build target
- Unleashed
- RogueMaster
- Official Flipper Zero firmware (API ≥ 87.1)
- Xtreme

## Use cases

- WiFi channel congestion analysis
- BLE advertising channel detection
- RC drone / FPV channel discovery
- Microwave oven leakage verification
- 2.4 GHz emitter location
- Wireless device research (defensive)
- RF spectrum education
- Authorized jamming/interference testing (v0.3.0+)

## Brand

PINGEQUA — "Precision Gear for Hackers". Hardware brand specializing in Flipper Zero, M5Cardputer, and M5Stick expansion modules. Store: https://www.pingequa.com
